name: CWF-340 Lineage Validator Canonical
description: Validates full lineage chain: topic → research → script → context. Gates entry to WF-400.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$json, cwf340_result: { status: $json.validation_passed ? 'COMPLETED' : 'FAILED', context_engineering_packet: $json.context_engineering_packet, lineage_validated: $json.lineage_trace.all_links_valid } } }];
